title: Treat BrandBuild and AI Video as the same product family
decision: Allow BrandBuild and AI Video Studio naming to coexist as one product family rather than treating them as separate repos/products.
reason: User explicitly said AI Video and BrandBuild are the same.
impact: Repo cleanup focuses on removing unrelated features rather than renaming everything immediately.

title: Remove roof-measure runtime source from BrandBuild
decision: Delete roof-measure runtime source from the BrandBuild repo and archive the implementation into BYOR reference storage.
reason: User decided roof-measure features belong in BYOR.
alternatives_considered: Refactor roof-measure into a shared multi-product package
impact: BrandBuild runtime surfaces are cleaner and no longer carry the BYOR-owned roof-measure feature.

title: Use .project-memory as canonical durable memory location
decision: Store persistent project memory inside .project-memory at repo root.
reason: A repo-backed location satisfies local-first persistence and keeps memory versionable.
impact: Future sessions should load and update this directory first.

title: Send BrandBuild cleanup upstream on main
decision: Push the roof-measure cleanup and project-memory initialization to origin/main as 3b02833.
reason: User explicitly asked to send all changed repos.
alternatives_considered: Delay the push until all naming drift was resolved
impact: BrandBuild is now cleanly upstream without the misplaced roof-measure runtime feature.
